summary.en: Stitch Fix combined data science and human stylists to send curated apparel boxes, creating a retail experience between e-commerce search and high-touch personal shopping.
summary.zh: Stitch Fix 结合数据科学和真人造型师，寄送精选服装盒，创造介于电商搜索和高接触私人导购之间的零售体验。

sources.label: Stitch Fix public filings and company materials
